title: Alpine Glow.
content:
Our lives are Swiss, --
    So still, so cool,
    Till, some odd afternoon,
    The Alps neglect their curtains,
    And we look farther on.

    Italy stands the other side,
    While, like a guard between,
    The solemn Alps,
    The siren Alps,
    Forever intervene!
meaning:
"Alpine Glow." is a quintessential example of Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
